step_rationale: Early myocardial ischaemia marker; albumin modification by hypoxia/oxidative stress.
mechanism: Ischaemia-modified albumin accumulates during acute myocardial ischaemia as a product of hypoxia-induced and oxidative-stress-dependent albumin metal-binding alteration, serving as an early injury-phase biomarker.

references.title: Biomarkers of cardiovascular damage and dysfunction--an overview.
